reply.text: Serious question how much trouble do you cause when the sun goes down

messages.text: see that orange drink screaming chaos already
impossible when the bikini got its own soundtrack
yeah it only plays men crying remixes
joke on you, i cry pretty aesthetic tears
as long as they dont hit my cocktail
you love the sound of you
i just know after sunset you unionize lifeguards
no i just fire them for staring too slow
crazy because id file for overtime instantly
nah you sound like unpaid intern energy
unpaid maybe, but i bring good commentary
commentary better be spf 50 or youre cooked 👀
